qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre AS PID, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org AS ID, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org AS CODE, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org AS TEXT FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org={#SOURCE:@FID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre AS PID, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org AS ID, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org AS CODE, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org AS TEXT, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org AS FID FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@fid} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre AS PID, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre AS PID, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@PID} AND ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org = ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura INNER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org={substring_before(#SOURCE:@code,\'-\')} AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org={#SOURCE:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org AS CODE, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org AS TEXT, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura AS ID FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
